Title: Failed Veeam backups for NOR
Notes: Monitor the Veeam backups for NOR. NOR backups were failed. So login into the server and troubleshoot the issue for failed backups. Backup repository space was Low disk space, only 20KB space was left. So open the backup repository path, clean the trashbox for the backups moved after retention policy. After that rescan the backup repository , now the space has increased to 714 GB. After this retired the backup job. Now backups are running.

Title: Crowdstrike latest version (7.34.20610.0) updated on machine:- WKNOR-CASSELLS, WKNOR-HOUSEKEEP
Notes: Connected to the machines (WKNOR-CASSELLS, WKNOR-HOUSEKEEP) and discovered they were running an older version of CrowdStrike. Attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but the process was unsuccessful.so connect to the system and uninstalled the older version, downloaded, and installed the latest sensor version (7.34.20610.0) on these machines. Verified the update through the portal. Hence, closing this ticket.

Title: Manage engine agent greyout issue for - WKNOR-HOUSEKEEP, WKNOR-FDLEFT,WKNOR-CASSELLS and DESKTOP-4FF8C8K
Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines WKNOR-HOUSEKEEP, WKNOR-FDLEFT,WKNOR-CASSELLS and DESKTOP-4FF8C8K not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

Title: My Remote version 26.1.20.9571 updated on machine WKNOR-BACKOFFIC, WKNOR-FDLEFT, WKNOR-FOM
Notes: Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine WKNOR-BACKOFFIC, WKNOR-FDLEFT, WKNOR-FOM running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  . Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 26.1.20.9571. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

Title: Screenconnect Latest version  (V 26.1.20.9571)  updated on machine WKOR-KEYCARD ,NOR-HQ-VBR-01 & DESKTOP-4FF8C8K

After updating, verify that the version on the portal has been successfully updated to the latest version. Hence Closing this ticket .

Notes:
NOR-WKOR-KEYCARD

  • Installed 2025-10 Cumulative Update for .NET Framework 3.5 and 4.8.1 for Windows 10 Version 22H2 for x64 (KB5066130).
  • Installed 2025-10 Cumulative Update for Windows 10 Version 22H2 for x64-based systems (KB5066791), including security fixes for CVE-2025-24052, CVE-2025-24990, CVE-2025-59230, and CVE-2025-47827.
  • Installed 2025-11 Extended Security Updates (ESU) Licensing Preparation Package (KB5072653).
  • Installed Windows Malicious Software Removal Tool x64 – Feb 2026 (KB890830).
  • Installed update for ASP.NET Core (x86) version 8.0.25 (KB5081277).
  • Installed update for .NET Desktop Runtime (x86) version 8.0.25 (KB5081277).
  • Installed update for .NET Runtime (x64) version 8.0.25 (KB5081277).
  • Installed Microsoft Visual C++ 2015–2022 Redistributable (x86) version 14.50.35719.0.
  • Installed Microsoft Visual C++ 2015–2022 Redistributable (x64) version 14.50.35719.0.
  • Updated Intel HD Graphics 630 driver [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_5912] to version 31.0.101.2137.
